title: Day 07 Reflection — Week 1 Retrospective
description: Honest retrospective after machine coding — this feeds your Week 2 focus plan.

prompts.question: What did you complete in 90 minutes? What was left unfinished?
prompts.guidance: Be specific: login validation, routes, responsive, etc.

prompts.question: List your three weakest Week 1 topics and one action per topic to improve before Day 08.
prompts.guidance: useEffect, Router, forms — pick yours honestly.

prompts.question: Where did you reach for banned help (AI/Google/copy-paste)? What will you change in Week 2?
What Week 1 concept felt easiest under pressure? How can you lean on that strength in Week 2 API projects?
prompts.guidance: Balance weak areas with confidence builders.
